extracted.title: TE Pipeline Conditions for 04/23/2026
extracted.description:
For Gas Day April 23, 2026, Texas Eastern (TE) has approved and scheduled nominations at each pipeline segment and meter station up to TE's operational capacity. The following locations have been restricted due to requested nominations exceeding TE's operational capacity:

Restricted Locations (table):
- North of Berne
- Meter 75919 Deliveries
- Rec from AGT & Del West of Lambertville (Notes: Planned Outage)
- TE/AGT Lease (Scheduled and Sealed: Yes; Notes: To Lease Capacity)
- Nexus/TE Leased Meters (Scheduled and Sealed: Yes; Notes: To Lease Capacity)
- 30" South of Berne
- Berne South
- Danville (Notes: Planned Outage)
- Tompkinsville
affectedLocations: Rec from AGT & Del West of Lambertville
